articles.title: PAHO Director highlights regional commitment to eliminating leprosy at conference in Rio de Janeiro
articles.summary: Rio de Janeiro, March 13, 2026 (PAHO) —The Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) reaffirmed its commitment to eliminating leprosy during the National High-Level Conference on Hansen’s disease held yesterday in Rio de Janeiro, where PAHO Director Dr. Jarbas Barbosa participated in the opening of the event and delivered a presentation on the challenges of leprosy in the 21st century.
